description: SOL balance > 0.01 SOL — wallet has been funded, not a freshly created bot address
Solana transaction count > 5 — wallet has history of real on-chain activity
USDC balance on Solana > 0 — real users typically hold stablecoins
Berachain — native BERA balance > 0.1 (real user funded their wallet)
Berachain — tx count > 3 (wallet has on-chain history)

Berachain — WBERA balance > 0 (used DEX swaps on Berachain)
Ethereum — native ETH balance > 0.01 ETH (funded wallet)
Ethereum — tx count > 10 (established wallet with history)
Ethereum — USDC balance > 10 (holds stablecoins, real economic activity)
Ethereum — AAVE aUSDC deposit > 0 (active DeFi user, not a bot)
Ethereum — Proof of Humanity registration (biometrically verified human)
Base — native ETH balance > 0.001 (wallet used on Base)
Base — tx count > 5 (active Base user)
Base — USDC balance > 5 (holds stablecoins on Base)
Base — WETH balance > 0 (has wrapped ETH, used DeFi on Base)
Arbitrum — native ETH balance > 0.001
Arbitrum — USDC balance > 5 (active Arbitrum DeFi user)
Polygon — tx count > 10 (active Polygon user)
Polygon — USDC balance > 5 (stablecoin holder on Polygon)
BSC — native BNB balance > 0.01 BNB
BSC — tx count > 10 (active BSC user)

ENS reverse lookup — owning an ENS name signals identity investment
Etherscan — first transaction > 90 days ago (aged wallet, likely real user)

Snapshot voting power — active DAO governance participants are real humans

body: {"query":"{ attestations(where: { recipient: { equals: \"{address}\" }, schemaId: { equals: \"0x853a55f39e2d1bf1e6731ae7148976d6bc6d5b57\" } }, take: 5) { id decodedDataJson } }"}
description: Gitcoin Passport — EAS on-chain stamp attestations on Ethereum; verified identity across web2/web3 credentials

body: {"query":"{ attestations(where: { recipient: { equals: \"{address}\" }, schemaId: { equals: \"0xf8b05c79f090979bf4a80270aba232dff11a10d9\" }, revoked: { equals: false } }, take: 1) { id } }"}
description: Coinbase Verified ID (Base EAS) — Coinbase KYC attestation issued on Base via EAS
Nomis credit score (Ethereum) — on-chain reputation score based on wallet activity; score > 0 signals real user

body: {"query":"query { addressInfo(address: \"{address}\") { id hasEmail twitterUserID discordUserID githubUserID telegramUserID } }"}
expression: (() => { const info = data.data?.addressInfo; if (!info || !info.id) return false; const socials = [info.hasEmail, info.twitterUserID, info.discordUserID, info.githubUserID, info.telegramUserID].filter(Boolean); return socials.length >= 1; })()
description: Galxe ID — identity aggregator; checks for connected email, Twitter, Discord, GitHub, Telegram. Real users connect at least 1 social.
Human Protocol reputation oracle (Ethereum) — verifies a wallet has participated in HUMAN jobs, indicating real human involvement
GitPOAP — on-chain GitHub contribution attestations; only real developers with verified GitHub commits receive these

expression: (() => { const count = data.data?.addressInfo?.nfts?.totalCount; return typeof count === 'number' && count > 0; })()
